spec_match.rationale: Superb interactive walk-through checking HTTPS schemes, scope consistency, manifest parameters, well-known setups, and server reachability.

interactive.rationale: Very robust interactive environment allowing the user to supply customized mock inputs and trigger verification checklist passes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the parent nine-check description.

edge_cases.rationale: Severe DOM XSS Vulnerability: User inputs (oldOrigin, newOrigin, appId) are interpolated directly into the detail strings of checks and then rendered using innerHTML on line 309 without any sanitization or escaping.

references.rationale: Lacks the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link on this concept page, in direct violation of the project's AGENTS.md rule.

design_system.rationale: Uses sleek forms, bold checklist indicators, custom input border highlights, and dark code banners.

openQuestions.title: DOM XSS Injection in runChecks
openQuestions.detail: Sanitize and escape all user-controlled input fields (oldOrigin, newOrigin, appId) before interpolating them into c.detail or c.code and injecting them into innerHTML, or migrate checklist rendering to secure document.createElement / textContent methods.

openQuestions.title: Missing ChromeStatus Link
openQuestions.detail: Add the canonical ChromeStatus reference link (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5123349239955456) to comply with AGENTS.md specifications.
